creator: freebsd@igalic.co
text:
hey Dave, thanks for the feedback.

re PORTVERSION, i meant to set this to the last commit, since there hasn't been a new tag in quite some while, but plenty of bug fixes and features have been released. instead i set it to today.

I looked at numerous other ports, and many of them seem to be putting things into /var/lib/portname these days, but i think i may have misunderstood

it does, indeed, seem like much better form to drop the web assets into /usr/local/share.

> Is it possible to drop gotosocial-styling extra bits? I guess the .css and LICENCE and README.md are sufficient.

I'm not sure i understand this.
Which extra bits?
the bits that are more useful to development, than to serving it?
